experience.title: Information Technology Specialist Information Security Officer
experience.description: Installing and configuring Oracle software versions 10g-12c. Scripting maintenance and monitoring tools. Creating Risk Assessment template based on NIST 800-30R1 to facilitate and evaluate secure software development practice.

experience.title: Vice President
experience.description: Perform database penetration testing and regular server and database scanning for security vulnerabilities and compromised passwords. Technical lead for database consolidation, backup software replacement, PeopleSoft upgrade and Anti-Money Laundering projects.

experience.title: Database Manager
experience.description: Created and supported multi-instance spatial environments for internet startup company. Gathered user requirements and designed and built logical and physical database structures.

experience.title: Senior Database Administrator
experience.description: Technical liaison and support manager for international leasing company. Traveled abroad as needed. Participated in due diligence audits of takeover candidate companies.

experience.title: System Staff Specialist/Database Administrator
experience.description: DBA for telesales, signature verification, and electronic payment systems. Participated in off-site disaster recovery exercises.

experience.title: Senior Database Administrator
experience.description: Converted document management system from Sybase to Oracle. Mentored and trained Oracle database administrators at client sites.

experience.title: Database Administrator
experience.description: Implemented and maintained critical high volume online and Internet server Oracle databases in UNIX environment.

experience.title: Associate Computer Programmer/Analyst
experience.description: Technical lead responsible for Pavement and Bridge Management Systems development and production Oracle databases operating in client/server environment.

extra_fields.certifications: Oracle Certified Professional (OCP), Certified Information Systems Security Professional (CISSP), Certified Information Security Manager (CISM)
